name: wdd331-practice
description: **Student:** Hunter Evans **Semester:** Spring 2026 **Live Site:** [View Site](https://hunterevans0.github.io/wdd331-practice/) ## About This repository is my Practice Site for WDD 331R: Advanced CSS. Each week I add new pages and styles as I work through the course assignments. The site deploys automatically to GitHub Pages on every push to main. ## Pages - [Home](index.html) - [Custom Properties and Nesting](unit-1/custom-properties/index.html) - [Layered Components](unit-2/layered-components/index.html)
author: Hunter Evans

scripts.build:css: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist', { recursive: true })" && postcss css/main.css -o dist/styles.css -u postcss-import -u postcss-nesting -u cssnano
